_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Regression-rate tracking — correlate filed Incidents back to the merge that introduced the regression; report as a quality KPI alongside throughput in the dashboard

steps.description: Add regression-link fields to WorkItem model (introduced_by_work_item_id, introduced_by_commit_sha, regression_classification ENUM, classified_at, classified_by) + Alembic migration + schema doc
orch/regression_link_service.py (classify + suggest_introducer heuristic) + iw regression-classify CLI command + integration tests
Incident classification form (htmx fragment + routes in dashboard/routers/items.py) + dashboard tests
Quality KPIs section + /project/{id}/quality-kpis route + per-merge regression badge on Batches/History rows + dashboard tests

scripts/backfill_regression_classification.py + tests/integration/test_backfill_regression_classification.py (AC8 coverage) + docs (testing-strategy §10, dashboard-design, schema) + tracker §8 row 4.7 -> DONE v1.4 + iw-ai-core-testing skill cross-reference + iw sync-skills
CodeReview: per-agent review of S01..S05 (database + backend + frontend + frontend + backend)
CodeReview_Final: cross-step global review — ENUM value consistency across model/migration/service/CLI/form, classified_by format consistency, AC1..AC8 completeness, integration round-trip
QV: Alembic migration round-trip + drift check
QV: Browser verification — classification form, Quality KPIs section, regression badge, empty-state and adjacent-flow no-regressions
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
